title: What did you do?
learningGoal: Speak fluently to answer past tense questions using negative statements and regular past verbs.
instructions: 友達から「昨日公園に行った？」と聞かれます。マイクに向かって、「いいえ、行きませんでした。私は家にいてテレビを見ました。」と英語で答えてください。(A friend asks if you went to the park yesterday. Speak into the microphone and answer: 'No, I didn't. I stayed home and watched TV.')
speakingPrompt: Answer the question: 'Did you go to the park yesterday?' Say: 'No, I didn't. I stayed home and watched TV.'
scenario: A friend is asking about your weekend.

subTasks.prompt: Answer 'no' to the question. (No, I didn't.)

sampleResponse.transliteration: ノー、アイ ディドント。
sampleResponse.baseTranslation: いいえ、行きませんでした。

subTasks.prompt: Explain what you actually did using regular past verbs. (I stayed home and watched TV.)

sampleResponse.targetText: I stayed home and watched TV.
sampleResponse.transliteration: アイ ステイド ホーム アンド ウォッチト ティーヴィー。
sampleResponse.baseTranslation: 私は家にいてテレビを見ました。

scenarioContext.targetText: Hey! Did you go to the park yesterday?
scenarioContext.transliteration: ヘイ！ ディジュー ゴー トゥ ザ パーク イエスタデイ？
scenarioContext.baseTranslation: やあ！昨日、公園に行った？

baselineTranscriptSentences.transliteration: ノー、アイ ディドント。
baselineTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: いいえ、行きませんでした。

baselineTranscriptSentences.targetText: I stayed home and watched TV.
baselineTranscriptSentences.transliteration: アイ ステイド ホーム アンド ウォッチト ティーヴィー。
baselineTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: 私は家にいてテレビを見ました。

acceptableParaphrases: No, I did not. I stayed home and watched TV.

criteria.name: Past Tense Verbs
criteria.description: Must use the -ed forms for stay and watch.

criteria.name: Pronunciation of -ed
criteria.description: Clear pronunciation of 'stayed' (d sound) and 'watched' (t sound).

adminCorrectAnswerSet.sampleAnswer: No, I didn't. I stayed home and watched TV.

feedbackRules.onPass: Great speaking! You perfectly pronounced the past tense verbs and used the negative form correctly.
feedbackRules.onFail: Please try again. Make sure you use the past tense verbs 'stayed' and 'watched', not 'stay' and 'watch'.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good effort! Remember that 'watched' sounds like it ends with a 't' (watch-t).

audioAssets.audioTranscript: No, I didn't. I stayed home and watched TV.

hintText: Make sure you clearly pronounce the 'd' at the end of stayed, and the 't' sound at the end of watched.
commonMistakes: Saying 'I stay home and watch TV' (forgetting the past tense).
